name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, state

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in the messages set *)
AllMessages == [msg \in messages |-> [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]]

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
       /\ coordinator \in [state \in {"Start", "Prepare", "Vote", "Commit", "Abort"} |-> "Start"]
       /\ messages \in [msg \in {} |-> Message]

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorPrepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Start"
                    /\ coordinator.state' = "Prepare"
                    /\ messages' = messages \cup [msg \in {1..N} |-> [sender \in Coordinator, receiver \in msg, type \in Prepare]]
                    /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants respond with VoteYes or VoteNo *)
ParticipantVote == /\ \E p \in Participants : participants.p = "Prepare"
                    /\ \E p \in Participants : messages \in [msg \in {p} |-> [sender \in p, receiver \in Coordinator, type \in {VoteYes, VoteNo}]]
                    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Vote"]
                    /\ coordinator' = coordinator
                    /\ messages' = messages

(* Coordinator decides Commit if all votes are Yes, else Abort *)
CoordinatorDecision == /\ coordinator.state = "Vote"
                       /\ \E p \in Participants : messages \in [msg \in {p} |-> [sender \in p, receiver \in Coordinator, type \in VoteYes]]
                       /\ coordinator.state' = "Commit"
                       /\ messages' = messages \cup [msg \in {1..N} |-> [sender \in Coordinator, receiver \in msg, type \in Commit]]
                       /\ participants' = participants
                       \/ \E p \in Participants : messages \in [msg \in {p} |-> [sender \in p, receiver \in Coordinator, type \in VoteNo]]
                       /\ coordinator.state' = "Abort"
                       /\ messages' = messages \cup [msg \in {1..N} |-> [sender \in Coordinator, receiver \in msg, type \in Abort]]
                       /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants commit or abort based on coordinator's decision *)
ParticipantCommitAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants : participants.p = "Vote"
                         /\ \E p \in Participants : messages \in [msg \in {p} |-> [sender \in Coordinator, receiver \in p, type \in {Commit, Abort}]]
                         /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Commit" \E p \in Participants : messages \in [msg \in {p} |-> [sender \in Coordinator, receiver \in p, type \in Commit]]]
                         \/ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Abort" \E p \in Participants : messages \in [msg \in {p} |-> [sender \in Coordinator, receiver \in p, type \in Abort]]]
                         /\ coordinator' = coordinator
                         /\ messages' = messages

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == CoordinatorPrepare \/ ParticipantVote \/ CoordinatorDecision \/ ParticipantCommitAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> {"Init", "Prepare", "Vote", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ coordinator \in [state \in {"Start", "Prepare", "Vote", "Commit", "Abort"} |-> {"Start", "Prepare", "Vote", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ messages \in [msg \in {} |-> Message]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a set of fork indices that are currently free *)
(* States: a sequence of length N where each element is one of {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == 
    /\ forks = {1, 2, ..., N}
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating if both forks are free *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks = forks \cup {i, %(i, N) + 1}
        /\ forks' = forks \ {i, %(i, N) + 1}
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i stops eating and puts down forks *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = forks \cup {i, %(i, N) + 1}
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element e *)
Enqueue(e) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, e)
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = NULL
    /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
    \/ state = "Follower" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1 /\ votedFor' = NULL /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ state = "Candidate" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1 /\ votedFor' = NULL /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
